children.heading: Subchapter II
children.label: a Subchapter II
children.text: No funds provided under subchapter II of this chapter shall be used to develop or undertake assessments that will be used to make decisions regarding the graduation, grade promotion, or retention of students for 5 years after .March 31, 1994

children.heading: Subchapter III1See References in Text note below.1
children.label: b Subchapter III1See References in Text note below.1
children.text: Assessments developed with funds under subchapter III of this chapter may be used for decisions regarding graduation, grade promotion, or retention of students only on the condition that students have been prepared in the content for which the students are being assessed.1
